title: Item Compare
description: A comparison tool that lets you compare item stats and enchantments side-by-side with visual +/- indicators, including support for Hypixel Skyblock. Simply hover over items and press M to instantly see which gear upgrades are actually better.
body:
# Item Compare - Universal Gear Comparison for Minecraft

Ever find yourself squinting at two different items, trying to figure out which one is _actually_ better? Wish you could just see a clear comparison of their stats and enchantments? Now you can!

**Item Compare** brings the intuitive item comparison mechanics from **Diablo**, **Path of Exile**, and other ARPGs directly into your Minecraft experience! With smart auto-detection that works with ANY stat pattern. Perfect for RPG servers, modpacks, and vanilla gameplay!

**✅ Universal Compatibility:** Works seamlessly with **Hypixel** (Skyblock, Bedwars, SkyWars), **Wynncraft**, **modded servers**, and **any Minecraft setup** - no configuration needed!

**[💻 View on GitHub](https://github.com/kr3mil/item-compare)**

## ✨ Features

- **🎮 Clean Interface:** Side-by-side gear comparison with visual +/- indicators (just like Diablo!)
- **🤖 Smart Auto-Detection:** Automatically finds and compares ANY stat pattern - Mining Speed, Breaking Power, Damage, Defense, you name it!
- **📜 Enchantment Comparison:** Compare enchantment levels with Roman numerals (I, II, III, etc.)
- **🎯 Visual Indicators:** Green for improvements, red for downgrades - see the differences at a glance
- **🔮 Future-Proof:** Generic parsing system automatically supports new stats as they're added
- **⚡ Zero Configuration:** Works perfectly out of the box with any items and servers
- **🏰 Popular Server Support:** Optimized for Hypixel Skyblock, Wynncraft, and other RPG servers with full stat pattern support
- **📦 Modpack Friendly:** Compatible with any modded Minecraft setup - works alongside other inventory mods

## 🕹️ How to Use

1. **Hover** over any item in your inventory and press **`M`**
2. **Hover** over a second item and press **`M`** again
3. **Boom!** The comparison screen appears instantly
4. Press **`ESC`** to close

## 📊 What Gets Compared

### Stats (Auto-Detected!)

- **Combat:** Damage, Defense, Strength, Crit Chance, Crit Damage, Health, Ferocity
- **Mining:** Mining Speed, Mining Fortune, Breaking Power
- **Utility:** Speed, Mana, Intelligence, Magic Find, Pet Luck
- **And literally ANY other stat pattern!**

### Enchantments

- All enchantment levels with proper Roman numeral display
- Missing enchantments clearly marked as "None"
- Level differences shown with +/- indicators

## 🚀 Why You'll Love It

- **⏱️ Save Time:** Make instant, informed decisions about your gear upgrades
- **📈 Optimize Builds:** Easily see which items boost your playstyle the most - perfect for PvP, mining, or dungeon builds
- **🎯 No More Guesswork:** Clear visual indicators show exactly what you gain or lose (ARPG veterans will feel right at home!)
- **🔧 Always Up-to-Date:** Auto-detection means it works with future updates and new content
- **🌐 Server Versatility:** Whether you're on Hypixel, Wynncraft, or your favorite modded server - it just works!
- **🎮 Familiar Feel:** If you've played Diablo, Path of Exile, or any loot-based RPG, you'll instantly know how to use this

**Installation is simple:** Just drop the mod into your Fabric mods folder and start comparing! Compatible with all popular modpacks and inventory management mods.

---
